text: Bachpan bahar beeta par ab yahan hostel mein reh kar lagta hai main na wahan ka raha na yahan ka, aur upar se dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki dadi ki dekhbhaal mein thak gaya tha. Mummy-Papa ne bohot sapne dekhe hain mere placement ko lekar, isliye main apna ye akelapan unhe nahi batata taaki ghar ki shanti na bigde. 'Log kya kahenge' ki itne saal bahar reh kar bhi ye ladka yahan adjust nahi kar paya, isliye main bas chup-chap sab sah raha hoon.

Dost ki shaadi attend nahi kar paya kyunki bimar dada ji ki seva karni thi, par asli wajah wo NRI return shock hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai. Main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se biradari mein koi sawal uthe ya Papa ki 'izzat' kam ho, isliye main apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon. Sab kehte hain main kismat wala hoon jo wapas aaya, toh main unka dil todne ke liye apni takleef kaise zahir karun?

Shehar badalne ke baad se bhasha aur mahaul bilkul alag lagta hai, aur shaadi mein na ja paane ka dukh main kisi se share nahi kar sakta. Agar maine ghar walon ko bataya ki main yahan bilkul akela mehsus karta hoon, toh unhe lagega ki main unke ehsano ki kadar nahi kar raha. Parivaar ki harmony bachane ke liye main bas 'thakan' ka bahana banata hoon taaki wo meri mental health ko lekar pareshan na hon.

JEE dropout hone ka darr aur bahar se wapas aane ka stigma mujhe sone nahi deta, upar se dadi ki caregiving mein itna nichod gaya hoon ki shaadi mein jaane ki himmat hi nahi bachi. Main apna gussa aur rona sab pi jata hoon taaki Mummy ko ye na lage ki unka ladka kamzor hai ya NRI lifestyle ne mujhe bigad diya hai. Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon.

Wapas India aakar lag raha hai jaise main apni hi zameen par pardesi hoon, par ye baat main hostel ke dosto ya ghar walon ko nahi bol sakta. Shaadi miss hone par jab sabne taane diye toh maine chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho aur Mummy-Papa ka mujh par garv bana rahe. Main apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon kyunki parivaar ki khushi mere liye unki 'izzat' bachane se badhkar hai.
